assertions: isEmailOpenType open types; last_email_open_at set+MAX on open only
buildFeatureUpsert text INSERT...ON CONFLICT(profile_id) DO UPDATE gated WHERE EXISTS(event-insert CTE)
events has one row for replayed id
older occurred_at doesn't regress last_event_at end-to-end
exactly one profile_features row per profile
two ws same external_id -> two distinct feature rows, no cross-bleed
workspace_id matches processing ws; count WHERE ws=A returns A only
A totals/counters/monetary reflect only A events
runs on admin BYPASSRLS pool proving in-code isolation

implUnits: buildFeatureUpsert: single CTE WITH ins AS (INSERT events ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING) INSERT profile_features SELECT WHERE EXISTS(ins) ON CONFLICT(profile_id) DO UPDATE total+1, last_event_at=GREATEST, last_email_open_at=GREATEST, counters jsonb increment, monetary+EXCLUDED
wire into planProcessing replacing standalone event insert with combined CTE, after profile upsert
notes: Idempotency = option (a) gate feature update on event being NEW in same tx. Since runPlanInWorkspaceTx runs statements separately (no JS RETURNING handoff), gate must live INSIDE feature SQL via single CTE: WITH ins AS (INSERT events ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING event_id) INSERT profile_features ... WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM ins) ON CONFLICT(profile_id) DO UPDATE. Replay -> ins empty -> no-op. Merges event insert + feature upsert into ONE statement, after buildProcessorProfileUpsert (keeps profile row for FKs). Workspace scoping: workspace_id $1 + (workspace_id,external_id) subquery, never client profile_id; holds on BYPASSRLS pool. SQL mirrors applyEventToFeatures: total+=1; last_event_at=GREATEST(existing,occurred_at); last_email_open_at=GREATEST only when open (NULL otherwise so GREATEST preserves); counters jsonb per-type COALESCE+1; monetary+=extractAmount for purchase-like. Reuse adminPool/hasDatabaseUrl + runPlanInWorkspaceTx; unique workspace UUID namespace per file; cleanup also DELETE profile_features. Excludes segment re-eval (Phase 5 extension point).
